summary: Complete testing of rebranded Smoking Chili Media Review Booster app - all core functionality working with proper red color scheme and branding
passed_tests: API health and connectivity (13/13 backend tests passed)
Homepage loads with correct Smoking Chili Media branding
Review Booster tool card has red color scheme (#e41c1c)
Review page form loads and functions correctly
Generate button has red background (#e41c1c) with white text
Tone selector active state shows red with white text
Form validation works via toast notifications
Message generation works with valid inputs
Copy to clipboard functionality for WhatsApp, SMS, Email
QR code generation and download working
Admin login page loads and authentication works
Client CRUD operations working (create, read, update, delete)
Footer shows 'Smoking Chili Media' branding throughout app
404 page handling for non-existent client slugs
Color consistency with #e41c1c red theme throughout

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core features working, minor timeout on admin copy button)
